// Generated by BoltFFI. Do not edit.
package {{ package_name }}

{% if uses_flow %}import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow

{% endif %}
data class Duration(val seconds: Long, val nano: Int)

data class Instant(val epochSeconds: Long, val nano: Int)

data class UUID(val mostSignificantBits: Long, val leastSignificantBits: Long)

data class URI(private val raw: String) {
    override fun toString(): String = raw

    companion object {
        fun create(value: String): URI = URI(value)
    }
}

sealed class BoltFFIResult<out T, out E> {
    data class Ok<T>(val value: T) : BoltFFIResult<T, Nothing>()
    data class Err<E>(val error: E) : BoltFFIResult<Nothing, E>()
}

@Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST")
private fun <T> boltffiUnsafeCast(value: Any?): T = value as T

private object Utf8Codec {
    fun maxBytes(value: String): Int = value.length * 3
}

{% if uses_wire_writer %}
private class boltffiWireWriter(initialCapacity: Int = 256) {
    private var buffer: ByteArray = ByteArray(initialCapacity)
    private var pos: Int = 0

    private fun ensureCapacity(needed: Int) {
        val required = pos + needed
        if (required <= buffer.size) return
        val next = ByteArray(maxOf(buffer.size * 2, required))
        buffer.copyInto(next, endIndex = pos)
        buffer = next
    }

    private fun writeLeI16(offset: Int, value: Short) {
        val v = value.toInt()
        buffer[offset] = (v and 0xFF).toByte()
        buffer[offset + 1] = ((v ushr 8) and 0xFF).toByte()
    }

    private fun writeLeI32(offset: Int, value: Int) {
        buffer[offset] = (value and 0xFF).toByte()
        buffer[offset + 1] = ((value ushr 8) and 0xFF).toByte()
        buffer[offset + 2] = ((value ushr 16) and 0xFF).toByte()
        buffer[offset + 3] = ((value ushr 24) and 0xFF).toByte()
    }

    private fun writeLeI64(offset: Int, value: Long) {
        var shift = 0
        var index = 0
        while (index < 8) {
            buffer[offset + index] = ((value ushr shift) and 0xFF).toByte()
            shift += 8
            index += 1
        }
    }

    internal fun writeRawBytes(byteCount: Int, writer: (ByteArray, Int) -> Unit) {
        ensureCapacity(byteCount)
        val baseOffset = pos
        writer(buffer, baseOffset)
        pos = baseOffset + byteCount
    }

    fun writePadding(count: Int) {
        ensureCapacity(count)
        var i = 0
        while (i < count) {
            buffer[pos + i] = 0
            i += 1
        }
        pos += count
    }

    fun writeBool(v: Boolean) { ensureCapacity(1); buffer[pos] = if (v) 1 else 0; pos += 1 }
    fun writeI8(v: Byte) { ensureCapacity(1); buffer[pos] = v; pos += 1 }
    fun writeU8(v: UByte) { ensureCapacity(1); buffer[pos] = v.toByte(); pos += 1 }
    fun writeI16(v: Short) { ensureCapacity(2); writeLeI16(pos, v); pos += 2 }
    fun writeU16(v: UShort) = writeI16(v.toShort())
    fun writeI32(v: Int) { ensureCapacity(4); writeLeI32(pos, v); pos += 4 }
    fun writeU32(v: UInt) = writeI32(v.toInt())
    fun writeI64(v: Long) { ensureCapacity(8); writeLeI64(pos, v); pos += 8 }
    fun writeU64(v: ULong) = writeI64(v.toLong())
    fun writeF32(v: Float) = writeI32(v.toRawBits())
    fun writeF64(v: Double) = writeI64(v.toRawBits())

    fun writeString(v: String) {
        val bytes = v.toByteArray(Charsets.UTF_8)
        writeU32(bytes.size.toUInt())
        ensureCapacity(bytes.size)
        bytes.copyInto(buffer, destinationOffset = pos)
        pos += bytes.size
    }

    fun writeBytes(v: ByteArray) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        ensureCapacity(v.size)
        v.copyInto(buffer, destinationOffset = pos)
        pos += v.size
    }

    fun writePrimitiveList(v: IntArray) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeI32(it) }
    }

    fun writePrimitiveList(v: LongArray) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeI64(it) }
    }

    fun writePrimitiveList(v: FloatArray) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeF32(it) }
    }

    fun writePrimitiveList(v: DoubleArray) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeF64(it) }
    }

    fun writePrimitiveList(v: ShortArray) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeI16(it) }
    }

    fun writePrimitiveList(v: ByteArray) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        ensureCapacity(v.size)
        v.copyInto(buffer, destinationOffset = pos)
        pos += v.size
    }

    @JvmName("writeByteList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<Byte>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeI8(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeUByteList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<UByte>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeU8(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeShortList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<Short>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeI16(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeUShortList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<UShort>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeU16(it) }
    }

    fun writePrimitiveList(v: BooleanArray) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeBool(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeBooleanList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<Boolean>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeBool(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeIntList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<Int>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeI32(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeUIntList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<UInt>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeU32(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeLongList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<Long>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeI64(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeULongList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<ULong>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeU64(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeFloatList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<Float>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeF32(it) }
    }

    @JvmName("writeDoubleList")
    fun writePrimitiveList(v: List<Double>) {
        writeU32(v.size.toUInt())
        v.forEach { writeF64(it) }
    }

    fun writeDuration(v: Duration) {
        require(v.seconds >= 0L) { "Invalid duration, must be non-negative" }
        require(v.nano >= 0) { "Invalid duration nanos" }
        writeI64(v.seconds)
        writeI32(v.nano)
    }

    fun writeInstant(v: Instant) {
        require(v.nano >= 0) { "Invalid instant nanos" }
        writeI64(v.epochSeconds)
        writeI32(v.nano)
    }

    fun writeUuid(v: UUID) {
        writeI64(v.mostSignificantBits)
        writeI64(v.leastSignificantBits)
    }

    fun writeUri(v: URI) {
        writeString(v.toString())
    }
}

{% endif %}

{{ record }}

{% endfor %}

{{ enumeration }}

{% endfor %}
{% for class_source in class_sources %}
{{ class_source }}

{% endfor %}

{{ callback_source }}

{% endfor %}
expect object {{ module_name }} {
{% for function in functions -%}
    expect {% if function.is_async %}suspend {% endif %}fun {{ function.public_name }}({% for param in function.params %}{{ param.name }}: {{ param.kotlin_type }}{% if !loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %}): {% match function.return_type %}{% when Some with (return_type) %}{{ return_type }}{% when None %}Unit{% endmatch %}
{% endfor %}
}
